title: snapctl uses host locale

steps.description: Install language-pack-de to set up German locale
Install snapd for snap package management
Install go-snapctl-tester snap which contains the test snapctl services
Set German locale in the environment
Verify snapctl services output follows host locale (before fix)
Attempt to force English output using LANG=C.utf8 (before fix)
Verify snapctl services output is in English (after fix)

expected_result: Before upgrading snapd, snapctl services output will be in German despite LANG=C.utf8. After upgrading to snapd 2.75.2+ubuntu22.04, snapctl services output should always be in English regardless of the host locale setting.
